Comimos rico, una breve parada en el camino, todo bien.

(Translated by Google)
We had a good meal, a brief stop along the way, everything was fine.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/16461763455653012667/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUNoeGZPLVJ3EAE

reviews.comment:
No tuve una linda experiencia ni de ida ni de vuelta!!!en el transcurso de 20 días no funcionó la Aplicación YPF, compre una bolsa de hielo y la chica del servicompras no sabia si correspondía hacerme descuento por ser socio!
La pilotean un poco los playeros que son macanudos,  los baños bien limpios como siempre!
No estoy conforme con el servicio! El tema es que te  cobran 5 lucas de cuota y últimamente el servicio es malo!!

(Translated by Google)
I didn't have a good experience either way! For 20 days, the YPF app didn't work. I bought a bag of ice, and the cashier didn't know if I was entitled to a member discount! The attendants, who are great, manage things somewhat, and the restrooms are clean as always!
I'm not happy with the service! The problem is they charge a 5,000 peso membership fee, and lately, the service has been bad!
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/16461763455653012667/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUNoM3NQUWJnEAE

reviews.comment:
Me gusto mucho como fusionaron las instalaciones viejas con las nuevas. Es como decir el ACA ha estado desde tus abuelos pero también está contigo! Re lindo

(Translated by Google)
I really liked how they blended the old and new facilities. It's like saying the ACA has been here since your grandparents' time, but it's also with you! So nice.
